text: UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 6 expands CBUAE licensing to virtual asset payment services
UAE entities have until September 16 2026 to regularise open finance licensing positions
UAE Securities and Commodities Authority reconstituted as Capital Market Authority from January 2026
UAE CMA introduces revised federal framework with increased sanctions for market misconduct
DFSA updates crypto token regulatory framework including new stablecoin treatment effective January 2026
UAE Central Bank issues responsible AI guidance mandating human-in-the-loop oversight for banks
UAE fintech market reaches $52 billion in 2026 with 52% of DIFC firms adopting AI
Lean Technologies becomes Saudi Arabia's first licensed open banking provider under SAMA
Saudi Arabia transitions open banking from SAMA regulatory sandbox to full licensing regime
GCC markets expected to develop comparable digital finance frameworks following UAE AI guidance template
